name: sgsimulation
description: Singapore Nation Builder — a browser-based city/nation simulation game starting at independence (1965).

scripts.test:e2e: node server/test/browser.test.js && node server/test/visit.test.js && node server/test/roads.test.js && node server/test/runway.test.js && node server/test/railtunnel.test.js && node server/test/tracematch.test.js
